# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      bucket: my-elasticsearch-snapshots
      region: us-west-2
      endpoint: s3.amazonaws.com
      access_key: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}
      secret_key: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}
      compress: true
      chunk_size: 100mb
      max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
      max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
      readonly: false
    filesystem:
      type: fs
      location: /mnt/elasticsearch/snapshots
      compress: true
      chunk_size: 100mb
      max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
      max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
      readonly: false
  retention:
    policy:
      daily:
        schedule: "0 0 * * *"
        max_snapshots: 7
        delete_after: 7d
      weekly:
        schedule: "0 0 * * 0"
        max_snapshots: 4
        delete_after: 30d
      monthly:
        schedule: "0 0 1 * *"
        max_snapshots: 12
        delete_after: 365d
  schedule:
    automated:
      - name: daily_snapshot
        cron: "0 0 * * *"
        repository: s3
        indices: "*"
        settings:
          wait_for_completion: true
          ignore_unavailable: true
          include_global_state: true
          partial: false
      - name: weekly_snapshot
        cron: "0 0 * * 0"
        repository: filesystem
        indices: "log-*"
        settings:
          wait_for_completion: true
          ignore_unavailable: true
          include_global_state: false
          partial: true
  restoration:
    settings:
      index_settings:
        index.number_of_shards: 1
        index.number_of_replicas: 0
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      rename_pattern: "(.+)"
      rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
      wait_for_completion: true
